scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @magicboard/api & npm run dev -w @magicboard/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @magicboard/schema && npm run build -w @magicboard/api && npm run build -w @magicboard/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @magicboard/schema && npm run typecheck -w @magicboard/api && npm run typecheck -w @magicboard/web
